summary: Backend API testing for AI Sessions and Identity Matching features. 19/19 tests passed for endpoint validation. Found 1 critical bug: ai-batch-analyze endpoint fails with 500 error due to missing columns in GalleryItem model.

critical.issue: Internal Server Error (500) - AttributeError: type object 'GalleryItem' has no attribute 'booking_id'. The endpoint tries to query GalleryItem.booking_id and GalleryItem.live_session_id but these columns don't exist in the GalleryItem model. The model only has session_id (legacy field).
critical.fix_suggestion: Either add booking_id and live_session_id columns to GalleryItem model, or modify the query to use session_id instead

action_items: Fix ai-batch-analyze endpoint: GalleryItem model doesn't have booking_id or live_session_id columns. Need to either add these columns to the model or modify the query logic in surfer_gallery_review.py lines 790-797
critical_code_review_comments: ai-sessions endpoint works correctly - returns sessions grouped by booking/live_session with pending counts
ai-analyze-photo endpoint works correctly - uses fallback matching (time_location, 0.5 confidence) when AI unavailable
ai-batch-analyze has model mismatch bug - queries non-existent columns on GalleryItem
AI identity matching service correctly falls back to time/location-based matching when EMERGENT_LLM_KEY is unavailable or analysis fails
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - tests use existing test user
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Sessions and Identity Matching APIs tested. GET /api/surfer-gallery/ai-sessions works correctly. POST /api/surfer-gallery/ai-analyze-photo works correctly with fallback matching. POST /api/surfer-gallery/ai-batch-analyze has a critical bug - GalleryItem model missing booking_id and live_session_id columns. Frontend components SurferGallery.js and AIProposedMatches.js have the 3-tab structure (The Locker, AI Matches, Review) implemented.

tests: Returns valid structure with sessions array and total_pending
Returns empty list for non-existent user
Session objects contain expected fields (id, type, spot_name, photographer_name, pending_count, ai_confidence)
Returns valid response structure (photo_url, surfer_id, is_match, confidence, match_methods, details)
Correctly uses fallback matching (time_location, 0.5 confidence) when AI unavailable
Requires session_id and surfer_id parameters - PASS
Actual execution fails with 500 error - FAIL (GalleryItem model missing columns)
ai_batch_analyze_api.error: AttributeError: type object 'GalleryItem' has no attribute 'booking_id'

tests: Fallback matching returns is_match=true, confidence=0.5, match_methods=['time_location']
Details include reasoning and requires_confirmation flag

backend_apis_tested./api/surfer-gallery/ai-sessions: PASS - Returns sessions with pending AI matches grouped by booking/live_session
backend_apis_tested./api/surfer-gallery/ai-analyze-photo: PASS - Analyzes photo for surfer matching, uses fallback when AI unavailable
backend_apis_tested./api/surfer-gallery/ai-batch-analyze: FAIL - 500 Internal Server Error due to GalleryItem model missing booking_id and live_session_id columns

rca_of_the_issue.issue: ai-batch-analyze endpoint returns 500 Internal Server Error
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: The endpoint code in surfer_gallery_review.py (lines 790-797) queries GalleryItem.booking_id and GalleryItem.live_session_id, but the GalleryItem model (models.py line 1569) doesn't have these columns. The model only has a legacy session_id field.
reproduction_steps: 1. Call POST /api/surfer-gallery/ai-batch-analyze with valid session_id and surfer_id
2. Endpoint attempts to query GalleryItem.where(booking_id == session_id OR live_session_id == session_id)
3. SQLAlchemy raises AttributeError because GalleryItem doesn't have these attributes
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Add booking_id and live_session_id columns to GalleryItem model, or modify the query to use the existing session_id field
